creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Follow-up to <https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2018-December/072516.html>

Now I can run both www/chromium and www/iridium – thanks, folks. 

grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % date ; uname -v
Tue 15 Jan 2019 02:42:00 GMT
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r343023 GENERIC-NODEBUG 
grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % pkg query '%o %v %R' chromium iridium-browser
www/chromium 71.0.3578.98_2 FreeBSD
www/iridium 2018.5.67_7 FreeBSD
grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ %
